summary: Atmosphere Journal feature testing complete. All 15 features tested. Backend API (4 endpoints) 100% working. Frontend UI (11 features) 100% working. Backend persists to MongoDB for authenticated users; guests use localStorage. Integration between frontend and backend verified.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed atmospheres
context_for_next_testing_agent: Atmosphere Journal fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/atmosphere/save, GET /api/atmosphere/gallery, DELETE /api/atmosphere/{id}, PATCH /api/atmosphere/{id}. All require auth. Frontend accessed via AI tab (tab-ai) in mixer nav bar. Key data-testids: sage-save-btn (green Save), sage-journal-btn (orange Journal), atmosphere-journal (container), atm-card-{id}, atm-apply-{id}, atm-delete-{id}, atm-journal-close. Journal uses 2-column grid with filter preview thumbnails. Hover reveals action buttons. Sage AI presets still working (regression passed).

tests_executed.test: Backend: POST /api/atmosphere/save requires auth
tests_executed.details: Returns 401/403 without token

tests_executed.test: Backend: GET /api/atmosphere/gallery requires auth
tests_executed.details: Returns 401/403 without token

tests_executed.test: Backend: DELETE /api/atmosphere/{id} requires auth
tests_executed.details: Returns 401/403 without token

tests_executed.test: Backend: PATCH /api/atmosphere/{id} requires auth
tests_executed.details: Returns 401/403 without token

tests_executed.test: Backend: POST /api/atmosphere/save creates entry with id, name, filters, source_prompt, created_at
tests_executed.details: Returns {status: 'saved', atmosphere: {...}} with all required fields

tests_executed.test: Backend: GET /api/atmosphere/gallery returns user's atmospheres sorted newest first (max 50)
tests_executed.details: Returns {gallery: [...]} sorted by created_at descending

tests_executed.test: Backend: DELETE /api/atmosphere/{id} removes entry
tests_executed.details: Returns {status: 'deleted'} and entry no longer in gallery

tests_executed.test: Backend: PATCH /api/atmosphere/{id} renames entry
tests_executed.details: Returns {status: 'updated'}

tests_executed.test: Frontend: AI tab shows 'Save' button after applying a mood
tests_executed.details: Green Save button appears after clicking preset (e.g., sunset)

tests_executed.test: Frontend: AI tab shows 'Journal' button to toggle gallery
tests_executed.details: Orange Journal button always visible in AI panel header

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Clicking 'Save' persists mood to journal
tests_executed.details: Toast shows 'Saved "Sunset" to your journal'

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Journal shows grid of aesthetic cards with filter preview thumbnails
tests_executed.details: 2-column grid with gradient thumbnails showing CSS filters applied

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Hovering card shows re-apply and delete buttons
tests_executed.details: Buttons appear on hover with correct data-testids

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Clicking re-apply restores atmosphere's CSS filters
tests_executed.details: Toast shows 'Restored: "name"' and filters applied to page

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Clicking delete removes card from gallery
tests_executed.details: Card count decreases after delete

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Journal shows 'N saved' count
tests_executed.details: Header shows '1 saved' or similar count

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Journal shows empty state when no atmospheres
tests_executed.details: Shows 'No atmospheres saved yet. Use Sage Prompt-to-FX and tap Save.'

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Last mood indicator shows below input after applying preset
tests_executed.details: Shows mood name with color preview dot

tests_executed.test: Regression: Sage AI presets still work
tests_executed.details: Sunset, Focus, Dream presets apply instantly

tests_executed.test: Regression: Sage AI prompt-to-fx API still works
tests_executed.details: POST /api/sage-fx/prompt-to-fx returns valid filters and mood

feature_verification.backend_post_save: WORKING - Creates entry with all required fields
feature_verification.backend_delete: WORKING - Removes entry, returns not_found for invalid ID
feature_verification.frontend_save_to_journal: WORKING - Persists to backend for auth users, localStorage for guests
feature_verification.frontend_card_grid: WORKING - 2-column grid with filter preview thumbnails
feature_verification.frontend_hover_actions: WORKING - Re-apply and delete buttons on hover
feature_verification.frontend_empty_state: WORKING - Shows message when no atmospheres
feature_verification.frontend_last_mood_indicator: WORKING - Shows mood name with preview
feature_verification.sage_ai_regression: WORKING - Presets and AI prompts functional
